buildCommand: pnpm -w run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/claimtrace run build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && cp -r artifacts/claimtrace/dist/. .vercel/output/static/ && printf '{"version":3,"routes":[{"src":"/assets/(.*)","headers":{"cache-control":"public, max-age=31536000, immutable"},"continue":true},{"handle":"filesystem"},{"src":"/api/(.*)","dest":"/api/index"},{"src":"/(.*)","dest":"/index.html"}]}' > .vercel/output/config.json
